calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-02-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Rafael Crespo, Jr., appeared with plaintiff Elias Georgopoulos, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Rene E. Peinado and Seven Hills Development, LLC.
Defaults were entered against defendants on June 25, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 20, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Elias Georgopoulos, and against the Defaulted Defendants Rene E. Peinado and Seven Hills Development, LLC, jointly and severally, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $12,085.00.
Costs - $386.63, for a total judgment in the amount of $12,471.63.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
